Rendering fidelity

This page exercises the common structure of a real article so the native browser can be compared, element by element, with how Firefox and Chrome render the same unstyled markup. Read the reference for context.

Checklist

  • Disc bullets sit in the gutter with the text hanging at an indent.
  • Nested block structure keeps a comfortable measure.

The release steps run in order:

  1. Freeze the feature set.
  2. Run the battery.
  3. Publish the signed index.

Comparison

SubsystemStatusNative
Filesystemext4 read/writeyes
Graphicssoftware rasteryes
A good default stylesheet keeps a plain page looking intentional, with a clear accent down the quoted column.

Code

fn main() {
    print("hello, hamnix");
}

Footer text after the rule.
